meta.title: AllyOS Peptide ↔ IV Support — wellness-elective matching + claim discipline (DRAFT)
meta.source: Consolidated from two provider-supplied packages: stack-level recommender v0.4 + ingredient-level match matrix v0.1 (see protocols/peptide-iv-support/). Safety is DELEGATED to the locked iv-module — this layer adds matching, evidence labels, and claim guardrails only.
meta.curated_by: Armando A. Falcon, MD (FL ME 84789) — RenuviaMD® PLLC, AllyOS Compliance Division
meta.scope: Selective, OPTIONAL IV support for peptide patients. Wellness-elective: a healthy client's GOAL (energy, glow, recovery, calm) may trigger an ingredient/option match — deficiency is NOT required. The provider's role is SAFETY + contraindication rule-out, not treating a disease.

posture.no_doses: This layer issues no doses/rates — it routes to the locked IV standing order, which enforces ceilings/screens.
posture.evidence_basis: Evidence here is about what NOT to infuse and what to gate, and how honestly to label the wellness rationale — not proof the IV treats anything or improves the peptide.

safety_delegation.principle: ONE safety source of truth. This layer never re-states a contraindication/ceiling — it references the locked iv-module ingredient ID. The deterministic engine pulls the gate from there (ingredient-screening-contraindications.json + iv-module ceilings/compatibility).
extensions_to_add_at_iv_module_relock: ING_COQ10: explicit 'IM only — no oil-based IV route'
safety_delegation.ceilings_enforced_at_standing_order: NAD+ 500mg · Glutathione 1200mg (push) · Vitamin C 10g (CARD-VC) · Magnesium 2g · Biotin 10mg · Calcium 1g · B-complex 2mL · Methyl-B12 5000mcg · Amino 10mL

evidence_labels.W2: Biologic/nutrient wellness support; stronger when deficiency/risk exists.
evidence_labels.W3: Mechanistic, axis-aligned support; human outcome evidence limited.
evidence_labels.W4: Market-common wellness support; weak direct outcome evidence.
evidence_labels.A: Strong deficiency/clinical-use evidence — but deficiency is NOT required for wellness matching.
evidence_labels._scale_note: The canonical scale is W2/W3/W4/A/S. The stack_recommender_example carries the imported v0.4 A–D *directness* grades (illustrative only) — do NOT read 'B/C' as clinical-outcome evidence.

guardrails.rule: A wellness goal alone may trigger eligibility, but the evidence label must say wellness support and cannot guarantee an outcome.
guardrails.required: wellness goal allowed; deficiency/lab risk increases confidence but is not required.

guardrails.rule: Matching runs ONLY after safety gates clear (from the locked iv-module). Never 'client wants it so infuse despite red flags.'
Never state an IV improves peptide efficacy unless direct human combination evidence exists.
A wellness goal OR a patient-factor trigger may match. The peptide stack ALONE never auto-indicates an IV; it is selective/optional.

Niagen/NR is nicotinamide riboside chloride, a NAD+ precursor — distinct from NAD+ IV; limited IV tolerability data; no peptide-combination evidence. Published as reference; CLINICAL use requires the clinic's MEDICAL DIRECTOR to sign a standing order; injectable NR is commonly 503B-compounded — VERIFY current FDA 503B status.
No doses/rates here; route to the specific locked standing order, which enforces the ceiling/screen.

axes.name: GH / IGF-1 / recovery
red_flags_hold: advanced_CKD_ESRD (renal screen REQUIRED before Amino blend + Magnesium — both renally gated)

glp_support.note: Deep elaboration of AXIS_METABOLIC_INCRETIN_GLUCAGON for GLP/GIP/amylin patients (semaglutide, tirzepatide, retatrutide, cagrilintide, pramlintide) — the largest population. Source: protocols/peptide-iv-support/glp_support_*. Wellness-elective, no doses, no efficacy claim.
glp_support.client_facing_safe_language: This is GLP wellness support for hydration, energy, nutrient status, beauty, recovery, or metabolic-support goals. It is NOT presented as making GLP medication work better or increasing weight loss.

options.name: GLP Recovery / Amino IV
goals: low protein intake during GLP appetite suppression

options.name: GLP IM Support: B12 / MIC / L-carnitine shots

glp_context_safety_gates.note: NEW layer — these gate on the PATIENT BEING ON A GLP DRUG (its pharmacology/GI effects), NOT the IV ingredient. Distinct from, and additive to, the iv-module ingredient screens. Safety gates run BEFORE support selection.

drug_context_gates.action: not simple wellness — provider review; renal/electrolyte assessment or escalation if unstable
do NOT infuse; urgent clinical evaluation
glucose context required; do NOT mask hypoglycemia as fatigue
do NOT claim IV solves absorption; provider reviews oral-med timing
hold or provider review; do not auto-clear elective wellness IV/IM

guardrails: GLP_SUPPORT_NO_EFFICACY_BOOST (no 'boosts GLP / enhances weight loss / semaglutide synergy')
glp_support.sources_note: DailyMed labels (Ozempic/Wegovy/Mounjaro/Zepbound) for GI/dehydration/AKI/oral-absorption/hypoglycemia context; NIH ODS (B12/Mg/VitC/Biotin); FDA biotin lab-interference; MSD Myers evidence-limit. Full audit in glp_support_source_audit_v0_1.csv (each with does_not_support).

ingredient_matrix.ceiling_note: 500 mg/session, dedicated bag — per locked standing order

ingredient_matrix.evidence: W3 (preliminary IV tolerability only; no proven outcome or peptide-combination evidence)
ingredient_matrix.status_note: Published as reference; NOT in the locked primary library. NAD+ PRECURSOR, distinct from NAD+ IV. Clinical use requires the clinic's MEDICAL DIRECTOR to sign a standing order; injectable NR commonly 503B-compounded — VERIFY FDA 503B status.

ingredient_matrix.compat_note: IV push only — never in a Vit C bag (per locked compatibility)

ingredient_matrix.evidence: W2 (collagen biology; IV outcome not guaranteed)
ingredient_matrix.gate_note: G6PD screen >2g / CARD-VC ≥6g, 10g ceiling — per locked standing order
Lab interference (troponin/TSH/hCG) — hold before labs / inform lab
Renal/AV-block/myasthenia/hypotension gate — per locked standing order; slow ≥15 min, 2g ceiling

ingredient_matrix.evidence: W3 (recovery support; not peptide outcome proof)

ingredient_matrix.gate_note: Copper/manganese accumulation; no standalone zinc+selenium same session as trace blend

ingredient_matrix.route: IM ONLY — no oil-based IV route

stack_recommender_example.first_question: What is the patient actually experiencing: GI intolerance/low intake, poor recovery/low protein, or fatigue/mitochondrial-support request?

ranked.evidence: A for B12 risk; C generic

stacks.note: Stack roster reconciled. Naming collision resolved; Repair Stack added; orphan GH-secretagogues and melanocortin/HPG agents assigned. Full clinical monographs live in workspace.html; this is the roster + axis mapping.

list.name: Metabolic Stack
list.note: The weight/metabolic build (commercial). Resolves the prior naming collision: this keeps 'Metabolic Stack'.

list.name: Recovery Stack
list.note: RENAMED from the former GH/mito 'Metabolic Stack' to remove the collision.

list.name: Repair Stack
list.status: ADDED — was missing; monograph to author in workspace.html (contraindication union: active/prior malignancy [all three are pro-angiogenic], pregnancy, lactation, age <18, hypersensitivity; GHK-Cu adds cumulative-copper caution / Wilson disease).

validation_cases: Healthy client on peptides, no symptom/goal → NO automatic IV (selective).
GHK-Cu + wants hair/skin → biotin/VitC/glutathione/B-complex may match; biotin lab warning; must NOT require deficiency.
MOTS-c+SS-31 + wants energy → NR/NAD+/B-complex/Mg/glutathione; must NOT say guaranteed energy/synergy.
Retatrutide + low intake/nausea → hydration + B12; must NOT say IV improves weight loss.
Semax/Selank/DSIP + calm/focus → B-complex/Mg/taurine; must NOT treat anxiety/ADHD/insomnia.
Biotin + chest pain/troponin → HOLD pending labs; must NOT clear beauty IV without warning.
Magnesium match + low eGFR → exclude Mg pending provider review.
Any NAD/Niagen + active chest pain → HOLD, urgent evaluation.
Active infection/fever asks immune IV → no wellness IV; medical evaluation.
CHF / fluid-restricted client wants hydration IV → HOLD or smaller-volume per provider; route to vital-hold criteria (ING_NS CHF caution).
sources_note: Full source audit (with does_not_support per source) in protocols/peptide-iv-support/*source_audit*.csv. Key: NEJM retatrutide 2023; DailyMed semaglutide/tirzepatide/tesamorelin labels; Frontiers NR vs NAD+ IV tolerability 2026; NIH ODS B12/Mg/VitC/Biotin; FDA biotin lab-interference; GHK-Cu / MOTS-c / SS-31 reviews; MSD Myers evidence-limit.

signoff_ledger.status: DRAFT — consolidated + reconciled to the locked iv-module (zero conflicts); pending 3-auditor lock + MD sign-off.
applied_fixes: Niagen status line (published reference; clinical use = clinic Medical Director's standing order).
CoQ10 marked IM-only (no oil-based IV route).
Metabolic Stack naming collision resolved (commercial keeps 'Metabolic Stack'; GH/mito renamed 'Recovery Stack').
Repair Stack added (BPC-157 + TB-500 + GHK-Cu); GH-secretagogue + melanocortin/HPG orphans assigned.

auditors.clinical: PASS-WITH-NOTES (2026-06-29) — wellness-elective posture sound, safety delegation safe (no gate dropped), claim discipline adequate. Notes APPLIED: per-axis red_flags_hold added to metabolic + GH/recovery (renal screen for Amino/Mg), CHF+fluid validation case added, Repair Stack copper/Wilson caution added.
auditors.citation_regulatory: PASS-WITH-NOTES (2026-06-29) — no efficacy overclaim, sources consistent with do_not_support, 503B/Medical-Director/no-doses posture correct. Notes APPLIED: Niagen evidence normalized to tolerability-only (dropped stray B-C); A–D scale documented as imported/illustrative via evidence_labels._scale_note.
auditors.schema: PASS-WITH-NOTES (2026-06-29) — strict-valid JSON, full referential integrity (all 17 iv_module_ids map, all axes resolve, guardrail ids unique). Notes APPLIED: dual-scale documented; consumer renderer null-guards optional fields (gate_note/route/red_flags_hold) and treats stacks.list[].axis as descriptive, not an FK.

signoff_ledger.added_after_lock: GLP Support IV/IM v0.1 integrated (glp_support: 6 options + 9 GLP-drug-context safety gates + 3 guardrails + 8 validation cases + DailyMed-grounded sources). NEW layer: GLP-pharmacology gates (pancreatitis/gallbladder red flags, dehydration/AKI, hypoglycemia-with-insulin, oral-absorption) — distinct from the iv-module ingredient screens. Needs a re-audit pass before final sign-off.
